parameters.query: INSERT INTO pagamentos (lead_id, valor, metodo, status, transacao_id, provedor, criado_em) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'confirmado', $4, $5, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (transacao_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING id
UPDATE leads SET status = 'pago', fase = 'pre', data_pagamento = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1 RETURNING nome, telefone, email, valor_divida
UPDATE conversas SET status = 'encerrada', updated_at = NOW() WHERE lead_id = $1 AND status IN ('bot', 'aberta', 'fila')
